course.title: AI Factory Pipeline & Orchestration
course.tagline: Research→design→build→test→ship — probe factory APIs and orchestrator stages.

m1.title: Pipeline overview
m1.concept: Research, design, build, test, and ship as orchestrated stages.

m3.title: Shipped products catalog
m3.concept: List COMPLETED products and capabilities from the factory.

m4.title: Orchestrator stage flow
m4.concept: State machine from IDEA_RECEIVED to COMPLETED.

m5.title: Capstone: factory probe
m5.concept: End-to-end probe with live factory or embedded mock.

site.quickstart_intro: Clone the repo, install deps, and run labs locally or in Colab.
site.certificate_intro: Complete all labs and exercises to unlock your certificate.
site.certificate_locked: Check off all labs and exercises to unlock
site.footer: Part of the AIMarket ecosystem — AI-Factory orchestrator and public pipeline APIs.

exercises.heading: Your turn
exercises.lab01_hint: List all five pipeline phases. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m1
exercises.lab02_hint: Fetch pipeline-status from mock or live factory. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m2
exercises.lab03_hint: List shipped products from /ai-market/products. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m3
exercises.lab04_hint: Walk orchestrator states to COMPLETED. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m4
exercises.lab05_hint: Run probe_factory end-to-end. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m5

lab01_pipeline_overview.hint: Map research→ship phases to orchestrator agents.

lab03_products_catalog.hint: List shipped products from the factory API.

lab05_factory_capstone.hint: Capstone: status + products in one probe.
